# Test audio-download command validation
# The audio-download command downloads audio file (requires --direct-rpc flag)
# Requires: <notebook-id> [filename]

# === AUDIO-DOWNLOAD COMMAND ===
# Test audio-download without arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test audio-download
stderr 'usage: nlm audio-download <notebook-id> \[filename\]'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test audio-download with valid single argument (should require auth)
! exec ./nlm_test audio-download notebook123
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test audio-download with both arguments (should require auth)
! exec ./nlm_test audio-download notebook123 output.wav
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test audio-download with too many arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test audio-download notebook123 output.wav extra
stderr 'usage: nlm audio-download <notebook-id> \[filename\]'
! stderr 'panic'
